response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify performance segment and participants (VTubers from Hololive). 2. Extracted song titles and artists: 'Ashita no Watashi ni Saiwai Are' by Nanawo Akari / Tamaya 2060% and 'Edison' by Wednesday Campanella. 3. Simplified artist names for search queries: 'ナナヲアカリ' and '水曜日のカンパネラ'. 4. Performed bilingual lyric searches for both songs. 5. Mapped scenes based on song changes and visual transitions.
response.global_summary: A two-song performance featuring various Hololive VTubers in a virtual concert setting as part of the #ShiroganeNoelBirthdayFestival2025.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel and Houshou Marine perform 'Ashita no Watashi ni Saiwai Are'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
半端ないぱっぱらっぱっぱらっぱらっ（へい）
限界突破らっぱっぱらっぱっぱらっぱらっ（へい）
毎日半端ないぱっぱらっぱっぱらっぱらっ（へい）
限界突破らっぱっぱらっぱっぱらっぱらっ（へい）
適温、うわ、幽霊が邪魔する通り道
八百万の嫌な外部的要素
「何の気なしと」
悪気もなく邪魔するとかさの
誰かが三拝々
あれ？これって結果 頑張れてる？
私とっても偉いじゃないか（Fight）
自分時間 堕落タイム確保
17時9時は死守マスト
さらに愛や恋や甘いも忘れずに
とどのつまり
オーバーワークは立ち入り禁止ですよって
注意喚起もしてますよ
ねえ楽して苦なくして生きてくって難しいな
だって
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unstoppable papparappa papparappa (hey)
Breaking limits papparappa papparappa (hey)
Every day unstoppable papparappa papparappa (hey)
Breaking limits papparappa papparappa (hey)
Perfect temperature, uh, ghosts blocking my way
A million bad external factors
"What's wrong with something?"
Bye-bye to someone else who gets in the way without any harm
Is it? This is the limit and the break, right?
Aren't I actually being very impressive? (Fight)
Ensuring my own time, my own relaxation time
Must ensure 5 o'clock to 9 o'clock
And don't forget about love, romance, and sweet things
In the end, overwork is off-limits
I'm warning you about that too
Hey, it's difficult to live without effort and without suffering, right?

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel, Oozora Subaru, and Yukihana Lamy perform 'Edison'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirogane Noel, Oozora Subaru, Yukihana Lamy
